title: BUG #18643: EXPLAIN estimated rows mismatch
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(c0 int, c1 varchar, c2 boolean);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(1, 'test', TRUE);
INSERT INTO t2(c0, c1, c2) VALUES(2, 'example', FALSE);
SELECT t2.c0 FROM t2 WHERE t2.c0 IN (SELECT c0 FROM t2 WHERE c2 = TRUE);
SELECT t2.c0 FROM t2 WHERE (t2.c0 = t2.c0) OR (t2.c1 IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: EXPLAIN returns inconsistent row estimates for similar queries
